app.name: Finder
app.heroDescription: Smart AI search finds the best price-to-performance gaming products, so you can play more and spend less.

home.trendingSubtitle: Live market changes in the last 24h
home.stepSearchText: Type what gaming gear you need.
home.stepCompareText: AI finds the best price-to-performance match.
home.stepSaveText: Buy at the right time and keep more money.
home.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Shop Smarter
home.featureSearchText: Natural language search finds exactly what you want.
home.featureReviewsText: Real opinions from unsponsored creators, not fake ads.
home.featureTrackingText: See market changes and grab deals at the right moment.
home.featureThemeText: Easy on your eyes, day or night.
home.featureLanguagesText: Works in English, Chinese, and more.
home.featureCurrencyText: Local pricing so you know the real cost.
home.audienceTeensText: Gaming gear that fits your allowance.
home.audienceFamiliesText: Fun gaming together without money worries.
home.audienceStudentsText: Maximum performance on a student budget.
home.audienceNewText: No confusing jargon, just good recommendations.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Level Up Your Setup?
home.ctaSubtitle: Join budget gamers who find the best deals with AI. No account needed - start searching for free.
home.ctaTrust: Free to use. No credit card required.
home.problemOne: Big brands charge too much for keyboards, mice, and headsets
home.problemTwo: Hours of searching still leads to bad deals
home.problemThree: Many gamers miss out because setups are too expensive
